title: My Totem Memes (MTM)
description: Adds some memes for your renamed totems (requires My Totem Sounds mod).
body:
!["Description" Title](https://github.com/ZipeStudio/Vault/blob/main/design/mods/main/ZSdescription.png?raw=true) **My Totem Memes** is a resource pack adds a touch of meme culture to your renamed totems.
Features sounds like "Za Warudo", Roblox "Oof", metal pipe, and many more!
Every time a totem with a special name saves you, you'll hear a funny sound instead of the usual one. > **Requires the [My Totem Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/my-totem-sounds) mod to work!** > Without it, the sounds won't play – the mod handles the name-to-sound linking. Simply drop the pack into your `resourcepacks` folder, enable it in-game, and rename your totem in an anvil. *Compatible with Minecraft 1.20 – 1.21.11. Open source and community‑friendly.* !["my totem memes banner"](https://github.com/ZipeStudio/My-Totem-Sounds/blob/master/img/mtm_banner.png?raw=true) --- ### 📢 Available Sounds Here's what you can rename your totem to and what you'll hear: | Sound description | EN | RU | |-------------------|-------------------|---------------------| | Rubber duck squeak | `duck`, `duck toy`, `quack` | `утка`, `кря` | | Fortnite default dance | `fortnite` | `фортнайт` | | Hammer hit | `hammer` | `молот` | | Classic Roblox "oof" | `oof`, `roblox` | `уф`, `роблокс` | | Camera shutter | `photo`, `screenshot`, `camera` | `фото`, `камера`, `щелчок` | | Vine boom (The Rock eyebrow) | `rock`, `vine boom`, `the rock`, `eyebrow`, `dwayne` | `скала` | | Dramatic scream "FAAAH" | `faaah`, `fah` | `фааах`, `фах` | | Baby babble | `gugu gaga`, `goo goo ga ga` | `гугу гага` | | Interval / pause sound | `interval`, `pause` | `litvin`, `литвин`, `пауза` | | Metal pipe falling | `pipe`, `metal pipe`, `pipe fall`, `clang` | `металлическая труба`, `балка`, `падение трубы` | | "Six seven" voice line | `67`, `six seven`, `sixty seven` | `сикс севен` | | ZA WARUDO! (Dio's time stop) | `dio`, `za warudo`, `time stop`, `the world`, `wrrryyy` | `дио`, `за варудо`, `зе вардо`, `тайм стоп` | > 💡 **Tip:** You can use any of the listed names – they all trigger the same sound. Mix and match to surprise yourself! --- If you have ideas for more sounds to include in this pack, feel free to share them in our [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/XmGF7rkkuY)!
